title: UltraTierTagger
description: This tiertagger shows all tiers of ultratiers in game.
body:
UltraTierTagger is a tier tagger to show someone's tier in game with out a website. People can see the tiers they achieved in their game  and also see other tiers from other people in game. Currently UltraTiers is not partnered with a any other tier tagger so if you want to see other/your tier in game from our tier list then use this.


- We currently support 1.21.4 - 1.21.11 Fabric. More support may come soon.
- /ultratiers <USERNAME> - to find all the tiers that a user has been tested.
- /ultratiertagger <ON/OFF> - Toggles the nametag/tab displays that you see.



### Our Discord _______
**[UltraTiers Discord](https://discord.gg/ultratiers)**

### Our Website _______
**[UltraTiers Website](https://ultratiers.onrender.com/)**

### Our Team _______
